![](https://ikes.com/icons/cart.png)

![](https://ikes.com/icons/menu.png)![](https://developer.apple.com/assets/elements/badges/download-on-the-app-store.svg)![](https://play.google.com/intl/en_us/badges/static/images/badges/en_badge_web_generic.png)

Central District\|2310 E Union St, Seattle, WA 98112\|Opens at 8 AM, Today

# We Are Uncle Ike's.

Founded on the belief that cannabis can enhance everyday life, we are dedicated to providing education, quality, and community.

## Your Most Trusted Cannabis Dispensary

Visit Uncle Ike's Pot Shop, the top Seattle dispensary, offering a wide range of high-quality cannabis for recreational and medicinal use. Our knowledgeable Budtenders are eager to help answer your questions and guide you toward the ideal strains, edibles, concentrates, and accessories that suit your specific needs and preferences. With a large selection that includes top-shelf flower, budget options, and everything in between, we serve all budgets at our friendly Seattle locations.

Enjoy a modern, welcoming environment at Uncle Ike's, Seattle's preferred recreational marijuana store, perfect for comfortable browsing and expert advice. Benefit from our daily deals, flash sales, and special discounts on premium cannabis products. Visit us today and make Uncle Ike's your trusted destination for all your cannabis and wellness needs.

![Uncle Ike's Team](https://ikes.com/images/ikes_about.webp)

## Our Values

01

### Customer Commitment

Exceptional Customer Service

02

### Employee Development

Positive Employee Environment

03

### Community

Giving Back to Communities

04

### Trust

Operating with Honesty and Integrity

Central District\|2310 E Union St, Seattle, WA 98112\|Opens at 8 AM, Today

The Blog

# Stories & Culture

Latest news, education, and vibes from the Uncle Ike's team.

[![Featured image for Journeyman Treats: A Salty, Sweet, Creamy, and Crunchy Cannabis Delight at Uncle Ike's Pot Shop Seattle](https://ikes.com/images/blog/journeyman-couch-potato-thumbnail.jpg)\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Apr 29, 2025 **Journeyman Treats: A Salty, Sweet, Creamy, and Crunchy Cannabis Delight at Uncle Ike's Pot Shop Seattle** \\
\\
Indulge in a munchie masterpiece with Journeyman limited-edition treats at all Uncle Ike's Locations. These cannabis-infused delights pack every crave-worthy flavor into one bite: salty, sweet, creamy, and crunchy.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/jounrneyman-couch-potato-uncle-ikes-seattle)[![Featured image for Journeyman's Hash Rosin Infused Lemonades: Your #1 New Favorite Cannabis Drink](https://ikes.com/images/blog/journeyman-hash-rosin-infographic.png)\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Apr 22, 2025 **Journeyman's Hash Rosin Infused Lemonades: Your \#1 New Favorite Cannabis Drink** \\
\\
Are you ready to level up your chill game? Journeyman's Hash Rosin Infused Lemonades are here to slap. These drinks are vegan, gluten-free, all-natural, and hit harder thanks to solventless hash rosin.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/journeymans-hash-rosin)[![Featured image for Celebrate 4/20 with Uncle Ike's Mega Sale: Unbeatable Cannabis Deals in Seattle](https://ikes.com/images/blog/420-mega-sale-banner.jpg)\\
\\
Deals\\
\\
Apr 17, 2025 **Celebrate 4/20 with Uncle Ike's Mega Sale: Unbeatable Cannabis Deals in Seattle** \\
\\
April is the month cannabis enthusiasts eagerly await, and Uncle Ike's in Seattle is rolling out its biggest 4/20 Mega Sale yet! From April 17th to April 20th, massive discounts on a wide range of cannabis products.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/celebrate-4-20-with-uncle-ikes-mega-sale-unbeatable-cannabis-deals-in-seattle)[Culture\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Apr 17, 2025 **Uncle Ike's 420 Checklist: Main Character Energy Edition** \\
\\
Because showing up high is cool, but showing up prepared? Iconic. Get your 4/20 checklist ready with everything from securing the goods to setting up the perfect sesh zone.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/uncle-ikes-420-checklist-main-character-energy-edition)[![Featured image for Discover the Award-Winning Blue Lobster Cannabis Strain at Uncle Ike's Pot Shop](https://ikes.com/images/blog/blue-lobster-jar.jpg)\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Apr 10, 2025 **Discover the Award-Winning Blue Lobster Cannabis Strain at Uncle Ike's Pot Shop** \\
\\
Meet Blue Lobster, an Indica-dominant hybrid taking the cannabis world by storm. With unique genetics, irresistible aroma, and potent effects, this award-winning strain is a must-try.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/blue-lobster-cannabis-at-ikes-com)[![Featured image for 5 Exciting New Seattle Cannabis Products You Need To Try this April – Only at Uncle Ike's Pot Shop](https://ikes.com/images/blog/packarillos-box.png)\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Apr 04, 2025 **5 Exciting New Seattle Cannabis Products You Need To Try this April – Only at Uncle Ike's Pot Shop** \\
\\
It’s officially spring, which means it’s time to refresh your rotation. From diamond-dusted pre-rolls to limited-edition vapes, here are five exciting new cannabis products only at Uncle Ike’s.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/5-new-products-uncle-ikes)[![Featured image for Free Fentanyl Test Strips](https://ikes.com/images/blog/fentanyl-test-strips-banner.png)\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Oct 13, 2021 **Free Fentanyl Test Strips** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's focuses on harm reduction with free fentanyl test strips. Free fentanyl test strips are now available at Uncle Ike's Bottle Shop and in the vestibule at 501 15th Ave E.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/free-fentanyl-test-strips)[![Featured image for Partnering for Success – Hollingsworth Family & Uncle Ike's](https://ikes.com/images/blog/slog-thc.jpeg)\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Feb 24, 2021 **Partnering for Success – Hollingsworth Family & Uncle Ike's** \\
\\
Discover the success story of the Hollingsworth Family and Uncle Ike's partnership. Learn how this collaboration has led to growth and innovation in the cannabis industry.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/partnering-for-success-hollingsworth-family-uncle-ikes)[![Featured image for 2020 – A Year of Giving](https://ikes.com/images/blog/efp-groceries.jpeg)\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Jan 31, 2021 **2020 – A Year of Giving** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's believes in the principles of corporate social citizenship. Here are some of the ways Uncle Ike's supported our communities in 2020 through fundraisers, grocery drives, and donations.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/2020-a-year-of-giving)[Community\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Dec 01, 2020 **Uncle Ike’s Pot Shop Calls for Peace** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's is deeply concerned by the ongoing senseless loss of life and is sensitive to the systemic disparities of marginalized communities in Seattle. The egregious attacks on employees must stop.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/uncle-ikes-pot-shop-calls-for-peace-after-employees-viciously-bullied-by-protesters)[Community\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Jun 19, 2020 **Northwest Community Bail Fund "Higher Power" Fundraiser** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's believes in equity and a fair criminal justice system. In June, Ike's hosted a charitable fundraising campaign for the Northwest Community Bail Fund.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/northwest-community-bail-fund-higher-power-fundraiser)[![Featured image for A Brand New Day at Leafwerx](https://ikes.com/images/blog/leafwerx-farm.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Dec 18, 2019 **A Brand New Day at Leafwerx** \\
\\
Diamonds are created when extreme amounts of heat and pressure are applied to carbon. Some might say Leafwerx benefited from a similar process. From legal battles to cannabis extraction success.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/a-brand-new-day-at-leafwerx)[Community\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Jun 24, 2019 **The Big Lift – Pride Week** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's is excited to sponsor The Big Lift during Pride Week, supporting the LGBTQ+ community and celebrating diversity in Seattle.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/the-big-lift-pride-week)[![Featured image for What You Should Know About Lab Testing Cannabis for Potency](https://ikes.com/images/blog/stock-pot-lab-testing.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Nov 07, 2017 **What You Should Know About Lab Testing Cannabis for Potency** \\
\\
There are a number of variables that are at play that can alter the potency of the cannabis you bring home from the recreational shop.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/what-you-should-know-about-lab-testing-cannabis-for-potency)[Community\\
\\
Community\\
\\
Aug 16, 2017 **Uncle Ike’s Gives Back to the Community** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's has always been committed to being a good neighbor. From sponsoring community events to supporting local organizations, here's how we give back.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/uncle-ikes-gives-back-to-the-community)[![Featured image for 5 Places to Live If You Love Marijuana](https://ikes.com/images/blog/marijuana-world-blog.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
May 25, 2017 **5 Places to Live If You Love Marijuana** \\
\\
The world is a big place. However, it can get a lot smaller if you love cannabis and want to live somewhere that allows you to enjoy the plant.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/5-places-to-live-if-you-love-marijuana)[![Featured image for Clean Green Is Keen](https://ikes.com/images/blog/clean-green-header.jpeg)\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Apr 25, 2017 **Clean Green Is Keen** \\
\\
Organic cannabis. Two good things combined are even better! The Clean Green Certified program regulates legal marijuana products grown using sustainable, natural and organically based practices.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/clean-green-is-keen)[Products\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Mar 01, 2017 **I Dream of Turtles** \\
\\
Premium cannabis infused edibles like those from Honu are a joy to the senses. The Chocolate Turtles and PB Pretzel Bites are tied for #1, because both are absolutely delicious.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/i-dream-of-turtles)[Products\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Sep 02, 2016 **CBD for You and Me** \\
\\
The CBD hype currently swirling through popular culture has a factual basis. Cannabidiol is an effective anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, antioxidant, and much more.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/cbd-for-you-and-me)[![Featured image for Finally, a Marijuana Book by Somebody Who Gets It](https://ikes.com/images/blog/weedbook.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Apr 04, 2016 **Finally, a Marijuana Book by Somebody Who Gets It** \\
\\
David Schmader is a bona fide marijuana user and his book Weed: The User's Guide is short, breezy and hilarious … because he gets it.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/finally-a-marijuana-book-by-somebody-who-gets-it)[![Featured image for Marihuana and Hasheesh One Hundred Years Ago](https://ikes.com/images/blog/pisos-marihuana.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Sep 15, 2015 **Marihuana and Hasheesh One Hundred Years Ago** \\
\\
If you think some folks are clueless about pot these days you should have been around a century ago when newspapers routinely claimed that marijuana turned people into insane murderers.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/marihuana-and-hasheesh-one-hundred-years-ago)[![Featured image for Perfect Pot Brownie Recipe Revealed!](https://ikes.com/images/blog/chef-ricky-cannabis-brownies.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Aug 11, 2015 **Perfect Pot Brownie Recipe Revealed!** \\
\\
The secret to marijuana brownies is to make them with kief. These words of wisdom come from Chef Ricky Flickenger, a caterer and former head pastry chef who has been cooking with cannabis for decades.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/perfect-pot-brownie-recipe-revealed)[![Featured image for Washington’s Best Concentrates!](https://ikes.com/images/blog/concentrates-promo.jpeg)\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Aug 04, 2015 **Washington’s Best Concentrates!** \\
\\
Uncle Ike's has lowered prices on ALL CONCENTRATES! Check out our menu or stop by and ask your favorite budtender about our selection!\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/washingtons-best-concentrates)[Products\\
\\
Products\\
\\
Jun 02, 2015 **Spot Pot Edibles Are Spot On!** \\
\\
Uncle Ike arranged for a visit to Botanica Seattle, the maker of Spot brand cannabis edibles. The euphoria and rapid growth and creativity reminds of the Seattle dotcom boom.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/spot-pot-edibles-are-spot-on)[![Featured image for Indica, Sativa or Blend? Tips for Marijuana Newbies](https://ikes.com/images/blog/indica-sativa.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Mar 26, 2015 **Indica, Sativa or Blend? Tips for Marijuana Newbies** \\
\\
In our modern era of legal recreational marijuana, choices for the consumer can seem infinite. Here are a few tips for those who need a bit of guidance before they shop.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/indica-sativa-or-blend-tips-for-marijuana-newbies)[![Featured image for A True Story of Maraschino Cherries, the Mafia, Marijuana and Bright Red Bees](https://ikes.com/images/blog/cherry-story.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Mar 20, 2015 **A True Story of Maraschino Cherries, the Mafia, Marijuana and Bright Red Bees** \\
\\
If I told you a story about a marijuana grow hidden beneath a cherry factory that was dumping so much toxic juice into Brooklyn sewers that local bees were turning bright red, you would mock me.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/a-true-story-of-maraschino-cherries-the-mafia-marijuana-and-bright-red-bees)[Culture\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Feb 24, 2015 **Confessions of an Incompetent Marijuana Grower** \\
\\
Last May I scored some decent bud from a Seattle dispensary and it contained seeds! The next day I became a pot grower. Less than two ounces for four month's work.\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/confessions-of-an-incompetent-marijuana-grower)[![Featured image for Medical Marijuana Better Than Recreational Marijuana? Not.](https://ikes.com/images/blog/medical-vs-recreational.jpeg)\\
\\
Culture\\
\\
Feb 05, 2015 **Medical Marijuana Better Than Recreational Marijuana? Not.** \\
\\
The myth that cannabis that is medical is somehow stronger and or higher in quality than recreational cannabis is pervasive. It’s a myth, people!\\
\\
Read Article](https://ikes.com/blog/medical-marijuana-better-than-recreational-marijuana-not)

Central District\|2310 E Union St, Seattle, WA 98112\|Opens at 8 AM, Today

# Price Match

Guaranteed Savings

## OUR PRICE MATCH PROMISE

Uncle Ike's Pot Shop now offers a price match promise for our Loyalty members on all regularly priced products from our Seattle competitors! We strive to offer the lowest prices in town but now it's guaranteed. You can now get the lowest price at all Ike's locations.

![Uncle Ikes Cannabis Dispensary Flower](https://ikes.com/images/flower-cake.webp)

### Details:

– Must be a loyalty member. Ask your budtender for more info!

– Competitors' items must be regularly priced. Exclusions include happy hour sales, holiday sales, daily specials, and any other specials/promotions.

– We will match prices of other SEATTLE, Washington state marijuana retailers, only.

– Item must be identical to the items being price matched (vendor/brand and size).

– Prices must include ALL TAXES (Washington state marijuana tax and local sales tax).

– Price must be available via competitor website, menu, or by calling the store.

– Price match items can not be discounted further.

– All sales must remain compliant.

markdown:
## We use cookies

We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. By clicking 'Accept All', you consent to our use of cookies. [Privacy Policy](https://ikes.com/privacy-policy)

[![Uncle Ike's](https://ikes.com/logo.svg)](https://ikes.com/)

![](https://ikes.com/icons/cart.png)

[![Uncle Ike's](https://ikes.com/logo.svg)](https://ikes.com/)

![](https://ikes.com/icons/cart.png)

![](https://ikes.com/icons/menu.png)![](https://developer.apple.com/assets/elements/badges/download-on-the-app-store.svg)![](https://play.google.com/intl/en_us/badges/static/images/badges/en_badge_web_generic.png)

Central District\|2310 E Union St, Seattle, WA 98112\|Opens at 8 AM, Today

# Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about shopping with us.

What Are Uncle Ike's Store Hours?

All Uncle Ike’s locations are open from 8am – 11:45pm every day of the week, including all holidays.

Who Can Legally Buy Cannabis?

Adults 21 and older can purchase and possess cannabis.

What Forms of Payment Does Uncle Ike's Accept?

Uncle Ike’s accepts cash only. We have ATMs at all stores. Credit and debit cards are not currently accepted for cannabis purchases.

What Are the Acceptable Forms of Identification at Uncle Ike's?

- Driver’s License, Instruction Permit, or I.D. Card issued by any U.S. State, U.S. Territory, or District of Columbia.
- Driver’s License, Instruction Permit, or I.D. Card issued by any Canadian Province.
- Valid Washington State Temporary Driver’s License.
- U.S. Armed Forces I.D. Card (Encrypted signature acceptable).
- Merchant Marine I.D. Card issued by the U.S. Coast Guard.
- Official Passport, Passport Card, Global Entry Card, Permanent Resident Card (commonly known as a “green card”), or NEXUS Card.
- Washington State Tribal Enrollment Card (No expiration date required).

Do I Have to Be a Washington State Resident to Purchase Cannabis?

You do not have to be a resident of Washington to purchase cannabis in Washington.

Can I see the marijuana before I purchase it?

Yes! In all of its packaged glory.

Can I try the marijuana before purchasing it?

No. There is no sampling allowed on property and it is federally illegal to give away marijuana for free.

Can I purchase cannabis products to resell?

Only if you want to go to jail! Reselling marijuana products is not allowed in the state of Washington.

How Much Cannabis May I Purchase?

In the State of Washington, you can purchase up to:

- One Ounce (28 Grams) – of usable cannabis a.k.a. Flower
- 16 Ounces of Cannabis-infused products in Solid Form (Solid Edibles)
- 72 Ounces of Cannabis-infused products in Liquid Form (Drinks)
- 7 Grams of Cannabis Concentrate (Dabs/Vapes/infused pre-rolls)

May I consume cannabis products on Uncle Ike's premises?

No, you may not open, smoke, or consume any cannabis product on Uncle Ike’s premises. Consumption of cannabis product is not allowed in public.

Can cannabis purchased legally in Washington be transported to other states?

No. Cannabis and cannabis products are only to be consumed in Washington State.

Can I return or exchange products purchased at Uncle Ike's?

WAC 314-55-079 – (12) A marijuana retailer may accept returns of open marijuana products. Products must be returned in their original packaging with the lot, batch, or inventory ID number fully legible.

Returns MUST be made within 10 days of purchase to the same store location where the purchase was made. The defective item MUST be accompanied by original packaging and receipt — this includes flower, joints, edibles, cartridges, syringes and disposable vapes.

Where can I smoke or consume marijuana products?

On private property only.

Will I get arrested for smoking in public?

Smoking marijuana in public is treated the same as public drunkenness, so there is typically a $350 fine that may be increased to $3,500 with possible jail time.

How do I get my product on Ike's shelves?

Please visit our [Vendors page](https://ikes.com/vendor-delivery) for more information.

What possible pesticides do your growers use on their plants?

Possible Pesticides Applied to Your Purchase:

- **1937 Farms**: Azaguard, Botaniguard, Clonex, Ecotec, and Mighty; Extracted via supercritical CO2.
- **AiroPro/ Harmony Farms**: Monterey 70% Neem Oil, Azaguard, Monterey Take Down Garden Spray, Bush Doctor Force of Nature Miticide, Organocide 3 in 1 Concentrate, SNS 203, Nuke Em; CO2 or distillate extracted; concentrates may include all- natural terpenes, but no other additives.
- **American Baked Co**: Nimbiosys Neem Oil, Kaligreen, PFR-97, Regalia PTO; Extracted via butane and propane, or CO2 and ethanol.
- **American Hash Makers/ Kohl Processing**: Bonide Bon-neem oil II, neem oil, Mantis EC, Milstop (discontinuing usage as of April 2018); Extracted via solventless bubble hash and dry sift.
- **Artizen Cannabis**: Regalia, BotaniGuard, Grandevo, Venerate, Clonex; Extracted via hydrocarbon.
- **Aurum Farms**: Clonex; kief extracted via agitation.
- **Avitas/ Pax Era**: Zerotol, Gnatrol, PFR-97, Suffoil-X, Pyganic, predatory insects;Extracted via supercritical CO2; including natural terpenes from strain and batch-specific extract source flower.
- **Ayra**: No pesticides.
- **Bacon’s Buds**: Beneficial Insects, Zerotol 2.0, Double Nickel LC, Procidic 2, Tritek, Eco-1, Triact 70, Super Wetter; Kief extracted via agitation, Bacon Grease extracted via ice water and heat.
- **Bodhi HIgh**: No pesticides; Concentrates extracted via hydrocarbons (via propane and butane blends) in a closed loop system with no additives. Cartridge extractions are as follows. Platinum: Hydrocarbon distilled and full spectrum high terpene extraction from live resin extractions. Bodhi High: Hydrocarbon distilled and strain specific terpenes. Limited edition batches use HTE pulled from dry high terpene extractions. Honey Tree: Hydrocarbon or ethanol, distilled, fractionated coconut oil and flavored terpenes.
- **Boggy Boon**: Safer Brand Sulfur, Pyganic 5.0, Aza-direct; concentrates extracted via butane, kief extracted via agitation. No additives to any concentrates.
- **Botanica Seattle (Spot/ Moxey’s/ Journeyman**: ): Beneficial bacteria, enzymes, living compost tea, Grandevo, Regalia; Infusion via butter, or ethanol or CO2 oil.
- **Burnwell/ Ag Grow**: Safer 3-1 Garden Spray, Clonex; Extracted via butane and ethanol.
- **C4/ CannaBurst**: No pesticides; Distillate extracted via ethanol.
- **Cascade Crest Cannabis/ Agro Technic**: Zerotol, Pyganic, Venerate, Grandevo.
- **Ceres**: Cease, PFR-97, Kaligreen, Suffoil-X, Bio Ceres WP, Rootshield Plus + WP, beneficial predator insects. Extracted via CO2 with no additives.
- **Coastal Growers**: Botanigard Maxx.
- **Constellation Cannabis**: Suffoil-X, Clonex, Nuke Em; Bubble hash extracted solventlessly via ice water.
- **Contender Gardens**: Trilogy, Grandevo.
- **Craft Elixirs**: No pesticides; Extracted via organic cane alcohol; Fremont Freaks infused via THC-infused syrup. Natural terpenes added to some extractions.
- **Creekside Cannabis**: Beneficial microorganisms, Double Nickel 55, Zerotol 2.0, Botanigard Maxx, SNS 209, Clonex, Pyganic, M-Pede.
- **Dabstract**: Azaguard, Nuke Em, PFR-97, Grandevo WDG, Botanigard Maxx, Safer Brand 3 in 1 Garden Spray, Zerotol 2.0, Regalia PTO, Gnatrol; Dabstract extracted via light hydrocarbon possibly including propane, butane, isobutane, heptane and ethanol; Panda Pens, Panda Pods and Hot Sugar extracted via food-grade ethanol; Panda Pens and Pods may have food-grade terpenes added. All grow rooms are individually tested for pesticides prior to harvest.
- **Daddy Fat Sacks/ Origens**: (Last updated 10/2018.) Clonex, beneficial insects, Nuke Em (discontinued as of August 2018); Solventless concentrates made via heat, water and pressure; BHO extracted by Kush Family Originals via butane; BHO extracted by Grow Bros using a 60/40 PHO/ N-tane mix.
- **Dank Czar**: Botanigard Maxx, Clonex, Pyganic 1.4, Azera Gardening, beneficial insects; Extracted via propane and butane. Distillates further distilled with ethanol. Solventless products processed with ice water.
- **Double Delicious**: No pesticides; Extracted via CO2 or organic grapeseed alcohol.
- **Eagle Trees**: No pesticides; Extracted via CO2 or organic alcohol with no additives.
- **Elevate Cannabis Company**: Starting July 2018: No pesticides; Extracted via Ntane and propane.
- **Evergreen Herbal**: Garden Safe Neem Oil, Baking Soda, Nuke Em, Natural Guard Neem Oil by Fertilome, Safer Bio-Neem, Ladybugs, Bonide Neem Oil, Azamax, Rosemary oil, Thyme oil, Clove Oil, Nymbiosys Neem Oil, Actinovate, Safer 3 in 1 Concentrate; Extracted via Ethanol, then converted to distillate.
- **Exotikz**: Venerate; Extracted via butane.
- **Experience Organics**: No pesticides, only predatory insects; Kief extracted via dry sifting, Rosin extracted solventlessly via heat and pressure.
- **Fairwinds Manufacturing**: No Chemical pesticides, indoor, in house only grown flower in clean room environment with beneficial insects only when needed; Closed loop extraction methods include hydrocarbon; tinctures infused via avocado oil. Oil Additives may include natural terpenes, see product ingredient lists for any other items.
- **Falcanna/ Olympus Horticulture/ BC Labs**: Organic Mineral Tea; Extracted via a butane and propane mix with no additives.
- **Farm Girl/ Caldwell Cannabis**: Clonex, Safer Insect Killing Soap, Flying Skull Insecticide and Fungicide; Extracted via heat and pressure.
- **Fire Bros**: Regalia, clonex; Rosin extracted via heat and pressure.
- **Fireline**: No pesticides; Extracted via hydrocarbon using propane and butane.
- **Flying Dutchman**: Garden Safe Neem Oil Extract, isopropyl alcohol mixed with water; Extracted via coconut oil, rice bran oil or shea butter.Freddy’s Fuego: Milstop (discontinuing as of June 2018); Extracted via a mixture of Isobutane and Propane in a closed loop system.
- **Fruit of the Root**: Pesticide free; Kief extracted via dry sift with minimal agitation to allow for premium trichrome heads.
- **Gabriel**: Clonex; Rosin extracted solventlessly via heat and pressure. Sauces, diamonds and cartridges extracted via PHO or BHO.
- **Gold Leaf Garderns**: Clean Green Certified; Nematodes, Soil Mites, Rove Beetles, Predatory Mites, bassania beauveria (beneficial bacteria strain), Rosemary oil, Mint oil, Dr. Bronner’s Organic Soap, Aloe, Willow Tree Extract; Hash and Rosin extracted via ice and water or heat and pressure with no additives.
- **GoodShip**: Starting November 2018: Beneficial bacteria, enzymes, living compost tea, Grandevo, Regalia; Infusion via butter, or ethanol or CO2 oil. Through October 2018: Azamax, Aza-Direct, Safer Insect Killing Soap II Concentrate, Green Cleaner (being phased out as of 11/2017); Extracted via CO2; Extracted oil may be additionally refined via fractional distillation. No additives are included.
- **Green Freedom/ Sweet As!**: Grandevo, M-Pede, Venerate, Regalia, Nuke Em; Extracted via PHO and BHO.
- **Green Labs**: Suffoil-X, Grandevo, Green Cure; Extracted via ethanol.
- **GreenMed Lab**: No Pesticides; Extracted via ethanol and distilled.
- **Green Revolution**: Organic compost, plant probiotics, predator bugs (ladybugs, primantis); Extracted from sun grown flower only via full CO2 or organic sugar cane alcohol extracts.
- **Green Rose Gardens/ Wildwood**: Kaligreen, Cease.
- **Green Vault**: Dip-N-Grow, Avana, Pyganic 1.4.
- **Grow Op/ Phat Panda/Sticky Frog**: Azaguard, Nuke Em, PFR-97, Grandevo WDG, Botanigard Maxx, Safer Brand 3 in 1 Garden Spray, Zerotol 2.0, Regalia PTO, Gnatrol; Dabstract extracted via light hydrocarbon possibly including propane, butane, isobutane, heptane and ethanol; Panda Pens, Panda Pods and Hot Sugar extracted via food-grade ethanol; Panda Pens and Pods may have food-grade terpenes added. All grow rooms are individually tested for pesticides prior to harvest.
- **Golden Tree Productions**: No pesticides. Extracted via butane or solventless dry sift.
- **Grow State**: Neem oil, Azaguard; Extracted via a 70/30 butane/ propane mix.
- **GStiks/ Gfarmalabs/ Satva Group**: Neem oil, Regalia; extracted via CO2.
- **Hazy Daze**: M-Pede. Concentrates extracted via butane. All other products infused via whole-plant extracts using the product’s main carrier oil; edibles are canola oil and topicals are arnica oil.
- **Heylo**: Nuke Em, Regalia, Cease; Extracted via supercritical CO2 and organic ethanol for refinement.
- **High Frequency Farms**: Suffoil-X, Actinovate AG.
- **High Road**: Nuke Em, Azamax.
- **High Supply**: Dragonflies and ladybugs.
- **High Tide**: (Last updated 11/2018.) Clonex, Regalia, Venerate XC.
- **Honu**: SNS 217, SNS 209, Sil-Matrix, Serenade Opti, Regalia PTO, Nor Cal 86 Mites and Mold Concentrate, Azamax (Parry America), Pyganic EC 5.0, Ed Rosenthal’s Zero Tolerance Herbal Pesticide Concentrate; Extracted via propane then distilled.
- **House of Cultivar**: Grandevo PTO, Regalia, Nuke Em, Venerate; Extracted via supercritical CO2 with ethanol winterization and distillation and carbon for filtration. Third party extractions via hydrocarbons.
- **Interstellar Concentrates**: Doktor Doom foggers, Azamax Natural Insecticide (EPA#71908-1-81268), Nor-Cal 86, Tritek, Grandevo CG, Nimbiosys neem oil; Extracted via a 70/30 mix of butane and propane.
- **Ionic**: Organocide Bee Safe 3 in 1 Garden Spray, Safer Pyrethrin and Insecticidal Soap Concentrate II, Nymbiosys Neem Oil, Nematodes, Venerate, Grandevo, Tritek, Trifecta, Greencure; Extracted via CO2 and ethanol distillation.
- **Kibble Junction**: No pesticides, only predatory mites; Extracted via a closed-loop butane system.
- **Kouchlock Productions**: (Last updated 12/2017) Azamax, Green Cleaner, Clonex; Extracted via N-Butane.
- **Lazy Bee**: Clean Green Certified; Nimbiosys, beneficial insects; Extracted via propane or CO2 with no additives.
- **LeafWERX**: Trilogy, Grandevo CG or PTO, Regalia CG, Venerate, Double Nickel 55, Companion; Extracted via CO2, distillates distilled after CO2 process, no additives.
- **Mantis Extracts/ Errrl’s/ Eco Ventures**: Neem oil, Kaligreen, Actinovate; light hydrocarbon extracted via N-Butane and liquid propane; THC distillates extracted via decarboxylated short path distillation techniques.
- **Mfused**: Predatory insects, Regalia; extracted via solventless processes (ice and water or heat and pressure), supercritical CO2 or food grade ethanol with no additives.
- **Miller Farms**: (Last updated 10/2018.) Organocide 3 in 1 Garden Spray.
- **Mirth Provisions/Legal Beverages**: Nor-Cal 86, Natria Neem Oil, Pyrethrum TR, Tweet-Mint Plant Wash (Klarite Farms has assured them that this product is approved), Ed Rosenthal’s Zero Tolerance Herbicide, Ed Rosenthal’s Zero Tolerance Pesticide, Grandevo CG, Regalia CG, Natria Neem Oil Conc, Botaniguard Maxx, Grandevo WDG, Nuke Em, SNS 217, SNS 209, Sil-Matrix, Serenade Opti, Regalia PTO, Tritek, M-Pede; Waxes extracted via BHO/ PHO. Distillates extracted via ethanol.
- **Nasty Jack’s**: Regalia PTO, Smite; Extracted via CO2 or ethyl alcohol, then distilled.
- **Northwest Cannabis Solutions/Magic Kitchen/ Legends/ Private Reserve**: Primarily predatory insects, nematodes andPyganic EC 5.0, AzaGuard, Monterey Neem oil, Safer Garden Fungicide, Venerate. Other products used occasionally as needed include Cease. Butane, CO2 or ethanol extracted. Oil additives may include propylene glycol.
- **Northwest Wonderland**: Des X, Ecotec, Grandevo, Kaligreen, Neemix, Pyganic, Sil Matrix, Surfact 50, Tritek, Trilogy, Vinegar. Extracted via full spectrum CO2 with no additives. Produced in an allergen friendly kitchen with no sugar added, 100% gluten free, and mostly vegan.
- **Novo Dia**: Rhizopon AA #2, M-Pede, PyganicII EC 5.0, Zerotol 2.0, Azaguard, Captiva, Ecotec, beneficial insects.
- **NW Nectar**: Outdoor Harvest: No pesticides. Indoor Harvest from Sept. 2018 on: bacillus thuringiensis, Organocide 3 in 1 spray, lemon water. Extracted via PHO/ BHO 70/30 mix with no additives. Edibles are vegan and gluten free.
- **Oil Tycoon/ WAPAP**: (Last updated 08/2018.) No pesticides; extracted via butane.
- **Okanogan Gold**: No pesticides, only predatory mites; Extracted via a closed-loop butane system.
- **Old McDonald**: Pyganic 1.4, Pyganic 5.0, Kaligreen, Des X, Clonex, Vinegar, beneficial insects, Ecotec, Grandevo CG, Grandevo PTO, Grandevo WDG, Neemix, Sil Matrix, Tritek, Trilogy, M-Pede, Aza-direct, Oxidate, Thyme Guard, Botanigard Maxx, Tenet WP, Epsom Salt, Nuke Em; Extracted via butane and propane.
- **Oleum**: See individual product packages for any source flower pesticides possibly used; Extracted in a closed loop butane/ propane hydrocarbon system or 200 proof ethanol.
- **Olympia Farm Works**: Nuke Em, Azamax.
- **Peak Supply**: Pyganic, Suffoil-X; Extracted via butane.
- **Pearl Extracts**: Clean Green Certified; Des-X,Ecotec, Grandevo PTO, Neemix, Pyganic 1.4, Tritek, Trilogy, Clonex, Nuke Em, Azamax, Regalia PTO, Nimbiosys Neem oil, Safer Brands Insect Killing Soap (Potassium Salts of Fatty Acids); Extracted via CO2, followed by winterization of ethanol below 500 parts per million.
- **Pilot Cannabis**: Greencure, Exile, Clonex. Extracted via butane and propane.
- **Pioneer Nuggets**: Oxidate 2.0, Suffoil-X, Cease, Kaligreen, Azaguard, Botanigard Maxx, Clonex, beneficial insects.
- **Puffin Farms**: Clean Green Certified; Nimbiosys Neem Oil, Kaligreen, PFR-97, Regalia PTO; Extracted via butane and propane, or CO2 and ethanol. Solventless extracts extracted via ice and water or heat and pressure.
- **Rochester Farms**: Clonex, Botanigard Maxx; Extracted via propane and butane, then distilled via ethanol. Additives include flower-derived terpenes. Tabs extracted by distillation via ethanol, then run through a nano emulsion process.
- **Royal Tree Gardens**: Regalia PTO, Venerate, PFR-97; Oil extracted via CO2, Kief extracted via dry ice, Cartridges extracted via CO2 in a closed loop system and contain no additives.
- **Saints/ Seattle Green Bud**: Clove oil, predatory insects, neem oil; Extracted via CO2 or hydrocarbon; both turned into distillate.
- **Seattle’s Private Reserve**: Clonex, Nimbiosys Neem Oil (discontinued June 2019); Oil extracted via a hydrocarbon system using butane and propane; vape cartridges extracted via refined BHO with glycerin-based flavorings.
- **Skagit Organics**: beneficial insects; Extracted via organic food-grade ethanol.
- **Skord**: Actinovate; PHO extracted via propane, hash and rosin extracted via ice water. No additives.
- **Smokey Point Productions**: Hormex Rooting Powder #8, Cease, Desect Diatomaceous Earth; Extracted via propane.
- **Solstice/ Native Herb Co**: Regalia, Azamax, Zerotol, SNS 209, Gnatrol, Suffoil-X, Botanigard Maxx, Clonex; extracted via hydrocarbon.
- **Sourface**: 2019 Harvest: No pesticides. 2018 Harvest: No pesticides.
- **Space Face/ The Pot Factory/ JBC**: Clonex, Neemix, Trilogy.
- **SubX**: Rhizopon AA No. 2, Azaguard, Regalia CG, Grandevo CG, Venerate CG, Monterey Horticultural Oil, Zerotol 2.0, OxiPhos, Botanigard Maxx, Mantis BE. Extracted via closed- loop hydrocarbon via butane and propane, or via distillation with ethanol. No additives in the cartridges; High Terpene Extract from live resin added to distillate.
- **Suspended Brands**: Regalia PTO, Smite; Extracted via hydrocarbons with propane or a combination of propane and butane.
- **Sweetwater Farms**: SNS 209, Organocide Bee Safe 3 in 1 Garden Spray, Azamax Botanical Inse-Mite-Nematicide, Green Cure; Extracted via butane or solventlessly.
- **Techbud**: No pesticides, only predatory mites.
- **THC-Express**: Neem oil, Milk, Baking Soda, Regalia, Grandevo, Cease; Extracted via butter.
- **Tikun/ Vi Medendi**: (Last updated 9/2018.) Procidic 2.
- **TJ’s Organics**: (Last updated 12/2017) Clonex, Neem oil, Karanja oil, Azamax, Rosemary essential oil, Thyme essential oil, Bronner’s Peppermint Soap.
- **TopShelf WA**: Clonex, Essentria, Gnatrol WDG, Nature-cide, Neemix 4.5, Nuke Em, Regalia, Safer Insect Killing Soap, Trilogy, Venerate (discontinued March 2019), predatory mites. Concentrates extracted via butane and ethanol, then distilled.
- **Total Concentrates/ Wamsterdam**: Cinnerate, SNS 209, Prevont, Aviv, Dipel, Zerotol 2.0, M-Pede, Azadirect. Extraction methods include: Cult and Club Live Resin: closed loop hydrocarbon via butane. Club, Club Lite and Composed Cartridges: ethanol and closed look hydrocarbon, distilled via wiped film evaporation; additives may include in-house extracted terpenes blended with distillate.
- **Trail Blazin’**: beneficial insects; Extracted via butane.
- **S. Cannabis**: (Last updated 10/2018.) No pesticides; Extracted via butane and propane.
- **Virginia Co**: Kaligreen, OxiPhos, Clonex; Edibles and rosin extracted solventlessly via heat and pressure.
- **Vulcan Mountain**: (Last updated 12/2017) Clonex; Pleaseant Valley 2016 Harvest: M-Pede, Green Cleaner, Thyme Guard; Extracted via ice method or butane.
- **WA Grower**: SNS 217; Extracted via butane.
- **WAM Oil**: Actinovate, beneficial insects, companion planting, dyna gro neem oil (discontinued as of 10/2019). Extracted via food-based CO2 and organic alcohol. Distillates further extracted via heptane, possible additives include organic terpenes.
- **Wander Farms**: beneficial predatory mites.
- **Washington Bud Co**: Predatory insects, hydrogen peroxide, Lacewing BE, Clonex. Canis products extracted via ethyl alcohol.
- **Waterstone**: SNS 217, Nuke Em, Cease, Double Nickel LC, Bi-Carb Old Fashioned Fungicide
- **Wave Edibles**: Natria Neem Oil; Extracted via CO2.
- **Weedbush Lovers**: (Last updated 10/2018.) Thyme Guard, Zerotol, Pyrethrum TR.
- **Wildflower**: No pesticides; Extracted via CO2.
- **Willie’s Reserve**: Greencure, Clonex, Bayer Natria Neem Oil, rosemary essential oil, thyme essential oil, garlic essential oil, peppermint essential oil, citrus acids.
- **X-tracted/ Refine Seattle**: See individual product packages for any source flower pesticides possibly used; Extracted via light hydrocarbon in a closed loop system from high grade starting materials from various producers.

Does Uncle Ike's Offer a Price Match?

Yes, Uncle Ike’s will price match regularly-priced menu items with Seattle i502 Pot Shops. The products must be the same brand and the same size we carry at Uncle Ike’s.

# IKE'S CAREERS

Why Work at Ike's?

## JOIN OUR TEAM

Uncle Ike's Pot Shop is a homegrown business; locally owned and operated. Employees receive competitive compensation and are offered medical, dental, vision, and life insurance.

### PERKS

• Generous employee discounts

• Flexible schedules

• Direct deposit

• Ongoing training & education

• Growth opportunities

• Bonuses & incentives

• Paid time off

• Community engagement

![Uncle Ike's staff members](https://ikes.com/images/ikes-join-team.webp)
